daemon = RunningDaemon(proc=<Popen: returncode: None args: ['C:\\Program Files\\OpenGeneral\\opengeneral...>, host='127.0.0.1', port=65327)
run = <function run.<locals>._run at 0x0000015E5C4B2CA0>

    def test_static_spawn_and_talk(daemon, run) -> None:
        # A "static" key needs no keyring secret and yields the StaticChatProvider. Keys
        # and action planes are daemon-owned, so register them through the daemon RPC.
        assert daemon.rpc("keys.add", {"name": "static", "type": "static"})["ok"]
        assert daemon.rpc(
            "action_planes.add", {"name": "default", "endpoint": "http://127.0.0.1:4767/mcp"}
        )["ok"]
    
        spawned = run(
            "spawn", "--persona", "coder", "--name", "s1", "--key", "static", "--model", "static/none"
        )
        assert spawned.returncode == 0, spawned.stdout + spawned.stderr
    
        talked = run("talk", "s1", stdin="hi\n/exit\n")
>       assert "I'm ready to work on that." in talked.stdout
E       assert "I'm ready to work on that." in 'Talking to s1. Type /exit to leave.\n\ns1> OpenGeneral daemon is not running. Start it with: opengeneral daemon start\n'
E        +  where 'Talking to s1. Type /exit to leave.\n\ns1> OpenGeneral daemon is not running. Start it with: opengeneral daemon start\n' = CompletedProcess(args=['C:\\Program Files\\OpenGeneral\\opengeneral.exe', 'talk', 's1'], returncode=0, stdout='Talking....
